rules.message: Blocking system dialog (alert/confirm/prompt) — blocks the main thread, can't be styled/tested, and is a poor UX. Use a non-blocking in-app modal/toast/confirm component instead. Test/e2e/fixture paths are excluded outright (deployed-surface rule). Suppress a vetted case with `// browser-ok:`. Interface/type-literal method signatures (`prompt(input: string): Promise<...>;`) are excluded — those aren't calls and would otherwise false-positive.

document.write/writeln breaks HTML parsing once the document has loaded (and is blocked under many CSP/PWA setups) and can clobber the page — build DOM nodes (or set textContent) instead. Test/e2e/fixture paths are excluded outright (deployed-surface rule). Suppress a vetted case with `// document-write-ok:`. Receiver-aware: only the bare global `document` fires — `win.document.write(...)` on a popup handle is deliberately skipped.
